title: Software to perform ranking of a finite collection of objects when a suite of indicator values (criteria) is available for each member of the collection (ranking)
author: Barrucci, Federica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This tool assists ranking  objects  in a transparent, comparable and methodologically reproducible manner. More specifically, there are four modules implemented: (1) Create a ranking session; (2) Invite experts; (3) Direct ranking or Scoring and (4) Reporting. The third module includes a repeated procedure to come to a (mathematical) consensus on the  objects  to be ranked. The application implements a specific procedure both for direct ranking and quantitative/qualitative scoring. The facilitator has access to all four modules, while the invited experts have restricted access to the 3rd module only.
